objects/Grass Land 2/TiledMap Editor/Tilesets/Beach-transition tiles between coast platform and beach - godot.tsx

properties.property: Mornings are my favorite.| Just the lake, the wind, and nobody talking.| Perfect.|| The ducks have returned.| They always know when spring is near.| Smarter than most folk.|| I've started locking my door.| Someone keeps stealing my apple jam.| That person has excellent taste.| I just wish they'd stop proving it.

The Red Trees are beautiful this time of year.| Sometimes I think they look different every morning.| Anyway, would you like something to eat?|| Everyone talks about monsters.| Nobody talks about proper seasoning.| Priorities, honestly.|| The pot was steaming again this morning.| Empty as ever.| It seems very committed to the act.||

My wife says I worry too much.| She's probably right.| Doesn't mean I'm wrong about the orcs.|| My wife is baking again.| The whole house smells wonderful.|| The orcs claim they've lived here for generations.| So have the deer.| You don't see the deer causing trouble.

You've been keeping busy.| I can tell by the dents.| Let's see what I can do for you.|| You remind me of someone.| That's not a bad thing.| Anyway, what can I help you with?|| I worry more than I used to.| Comes with age, I suppose.| Make sure your gear is ready before you head out.

I was just sorting today's haul.| Well, avoiding sorting it, really.| Feel free to browse.|| Was about to close up.| ...Can probably stay open a little longer.| Take your time.|| You always seem to arrive at the right time.| Or maybe I just notice it.| See if anything catches your eye.

The winds carry strange omens today...| I've seen signs like these before.| Perhaps you'll find something useful inside.|| Magic reveals many secrets, but never all of them.| There is always more to discover.| Come take a look when you have a moment.|| Ah, another seeker of knowledge.| The world is full of mysteries.| Care to have a look around?

Ah, there you are.| I was beginning to think all the interesting people had left town.| Have a look at what I've brewed today.|| Strong body, tired eyes... I've seen that combination before.| Good thing I know a thing or two about recovery.| Let me show you my finest mixtures.|| Well, aren't you a pleasant sight.| Looking for a remedy... or just an excuse to visit me?| Either way, I might have exactly what you need.

Welcome! Welcome!| Fresh goods, fair prices, no questions asked!| ...I mean, asked if you'd like to buy something.|| Ah! Customer!| That's much better than a city guard.| Please, have a look.|| Best food in town.| At least, that's what the previous owner used to say.| Browse if you'd like.|| You look hungry.| That's good. Hungry customers rarely investigate things.| I mean—welcome!
